summary:
Nitrates relieve acute angina through significant coronary artery dilation; they reduce myocardial oxygen consumption while improving perfusion via widespread vascular relaxation. \boxed{A}

The summary concisely captures the essential mechanisms without extraneous details, focusing clearly on how nitrates alleviate symptoms pertinent to managing acutely occurring chest pain due to ischemia or reduced cardiac supply-demand balance.
